'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 81''' was the eighty-first issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[July 16]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]
*[[Mas Amedda/Legends|Mas Amedda]]
*[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]
*[[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]
*[[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]]
*[[B1-series battle droid/Legends|Trade Federation Battle Droids]]
*[[Geonosis droid factories/Legends|Geonosis Droid Manufacturing Plant]]
*[[Core ship/Legends|Trade Federation Battleship Core]]
